message:
feat(doctor): implement --fix for config creation

When running `dcg doctor --fix` and no config file exists:
- Creates ~/.config/dcg/config.toml with sample config
- Creates parent directories if needed
- Non-destructive: won't overwrite existing files

Closes git_safety_guard-1gt.7.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
